message:
feat: multi-row-group Parquet with column statistics for page skipping

Rewrite generate-bench-data.ts to produce Parquet files with multiple
row groups (10K rows each) and per-column min/max statistics. This
enables page-level skipping via footer stats — queries with filters
now skip row groups that can't match, reducing R2 reads significantly.

- 100K files: 10 row groups, 1M files: 100 row groups
- Each row group has min/max stats for int, float, and string columns
- Verified: 1M filter id>900000 skips 90/200 pages (191ms vs 256ms)
